description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in a distinctive, fantasy-inspired outfit. The individual wears a large, wide-brimmed, pointed hat adorned with circular accents and a prominent badge on the front, giving a wizard-like appearance. The upper body is clad in a sleeveless, fitted top, while the lower body features voluminous, cropped pants with reinforced knee patches and utility pouches attached at the hips. The arms are extended outward, revealing gloves and mechanical or armored forearms, suggesting a blend of technology and magic. The feet are bare, and the overall attire is accessorized with belts and straps, enhancing the utilitarian aesthetic. The character's face is obscured by the hat, and long hair is visible beneath it.
description: A fantasy-inspired adult pedestrian wearing a large pointed hat, sleeveless top, voluminous cropped pants, utility pouches, and gloves with mechanical forearms. The figure has bare feet and long hair, with a wizard-like, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide-brimmed hat, sleeveless top, utility pouches, and voluminous pants with visible knee patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hat's pointed tip, the profile of the mechanical forearm, and the layered structure of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the badge on the hat, the back of the sleeveless top, and the arrangement of the pouches and straps.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hat's curve, mechanical forearm, and the side profile of the pants and pouches.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-inspired sleeveless top, voluminous cropped pants, utility belt, wide-brimmed pointed hat, gloves with mechanical forearms
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair partially covered by hat
